<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Drivers\Gd\Modifiers; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ImageInterface; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\SpecializedInterface; use Intervention\Image\Modifiers\ResolutionModifier as GenericResolutionModifier; class ResolutionModifier extends GenericResolutionModifier implements SpecializedInterface { /** * {@inheritdoc} * * @see ModifierInterface::apply() */ public function apply(ImageInterface $image): ImageInterface { $x = intval(round($this->x)); $y = intval(round($this->y)); foreach ($image as $frame) { imageresolution($frame->native(), $x, $y); } return $image; } }
